title: Plugins
html:
Plugins

Living record of which Obsidian plugins are installed and why. See PLUGIN DECISION FRAMEWORK for the rules. Claude reads this during DENSIFY — anything with last actually used >30 days ago gets flagged.

Currently installed (Day 1 stack — 9 plugins)

  • Obsidian Git — auto-commit safety net | keep: edits-without-loss requires it | last actually used: 2026-04-26
  • Excalibrain — radial mind-map view | keep: THE core experience | last actually used: 2026-04-26
  • Dataview — markdown query engine | keep: ExcaliBrain hard dependency (reads parent/child fields) | last actually used: 2026-04-26
  • Excalidraw — drawing/canvas tool | keep: ExcaliBrain hard dependency (rendering canvas) | last actually used: 2026-04-26
  • Hover Editor — floating preview on hover | keep: fluid navigation | last actually used: 2026-04-26
  • Smart Connections — semantic similarity sidebar | keep: density backstop | last actually used: 2026-04-26
  • Automatic Linker — retroactive plain-text → wikilink | keep: 3× density overnight | last actually used: 2026-04-26
  • Obsidian Importer — Apple Notes / Notion / Bear / etc. import | keep: replaces Exporter.app | last actually used: 2026-04-26
  • Style Settings — theme tuning UI | keep: AnuPpuccin requires it | last actually used: 2026-04-26

Theme

  • AnuPpuccin (Mocha) — dark immersive palette for the graph view

CSS Snippets

  • graph-glow.css — node drop-shadows, glowing edges, radial background
  • node-labels.css — larger graph node text

Tried and uninstalled

(none yet — track here when you remove anything)

Considering

(none yet — see PLUGIN AVOID for the explicit do-not-install list)

The 1-week reassessment rule

Every Sunday, ask of each plugin: "did I use this in the last 7 days?" If no → uninstall. Update this page.
